title: Public service to get AI guardrails for fairer system
description: The use of artificial intelligence in the public service and federal agencies will be regulated under new rules to provide a transparent and fair service.
content:
Artificial intelligence used in automated decision-making by the public service and federal agencies will face new rules under a national plan designed to make the system fairer and more transparent.

title: Pocket-size AI: Powerful phones star at China show
description: Tech firms are racing to roll out advanced smartphones that use artificial intelligence to do everything from ordering food to composing messages upon a simple voice command.
content:

title: AI may predict harmful chemical exposures affecting human health
description: Artificial intelligence is rapidly improving scientists' ability to detect chemicals in the environment and human body.

title: Tata’s fashion brand Westside plans biggest push yet with 100 annual stores
description: Trent's Westside brand plans to open one hundred new stores annually. This expansion aims to invigorate growth and reach new markets. title: AI wildlife warning system trial aims to reduce animal
description: An estimated 10 million animals are killed on Australian roads each year. It's hoped a new artificial intelligence-powered alert system being trialled on the Monaro Highway near Canberra will reduce the toll.
content:
An artificial intelligence-powered alert system is being trialled on a stretch of the Monaro Highway between Canberra and the Snowy Mountains in a bid to stop wildlife from becoming roadkill.

description: Most of us never chose to live in an artificial intelligence (AI) world. Yet over the past few years, it has become part of everyday life, changing how we think, learn and communicate.
